This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2024-01-27, 2024-03-15, 2024-03-19. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
  • wikidata from wikipedia tag
  • wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for artist prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name:etymology prefixed tags

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:sv']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
North Shore - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for artist prefixed tags
artist:wikidata and artist:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because artist:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q6833370 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Michael Parekowhai to en:Michael Parekōwhai
The World Turns - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(3013751688)['artist:wikidata'='Q6833370']['artist:wikipedia'='en:Michael Parekowhai']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for artist prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name:etymology prefixed tags
name:etymology:wikidata and name:etymology:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because name:etymology:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q7653424 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Old Swan Brewery to en:Swan Brewery
Old Swan Brewery - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q5195645 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Curtin University, Malaysia to en:Curtin University Malaysia
Malaysian Garden - an affected OSM element that may be improved
